name: Admin Privilege Activity Monitor
description: Monitors administrative privilege usage for anomalous patterns including off-hours activity, unusual commands, bulk changes, and geographic anomalies. Uses AI to analyze admin actions against behavioral baselines, flags high-risk deviations, creates audit tickets for suspicious activity, and generates periodic compliance reports.
author: T1 Agentics

required_integrations.name: Microsoft Graph
required_integrations.reason: Query admin audit logs and privileged role assignments

required_integrations.name: Jira
required_integrations.reason: Create audit tickets for suspicious admin activity

data.title: Admin Activity Alert
data.summary: Fires on anomalous admin activity or privileged access alert

data.title: AI Admin Activity Analysis
data.summary: Analyze admin actions for insider threat and anomaly indicators

data.title: High-Risk Anomaly?
data.summary: Branch if AI flags the admin activity as high-risk deviation

data.title: Compile Activity Summary
data.summary: Compile detailed admin activity summary with risk indicators

config.code:
alert = context['trigger']['alert']
result = {'admin_user': alert.get('admin_email'), 'action_count': alert.get('action_count', 0), 'off_hours': alert.get('off_hours', False), 'geo_anomaly': alert.get('geo_anomaly', False), 'actions': alert.get('admin_actions', [])}

data.title: Create Audit Ticket
data.summary: Create Jira audit ticket for suspicious admin activity investigation

config.title: Admin Activity Audit: {{$.trigger.alert.admin_email}} — High-Risk Anomaly
config.description: Anomalous admin activity detected for {{$.trigger.alert.admin_email}}. Risk level: HIGH. Actions: {{$.nodes.am-4.result.action_count}}. Off-hours: {{$.nodes.am-4.result.off_hours}}. Geo anomaly: {{$.nodes.am-4.result.geo_anomaly}}. Manual investigation required.

data.title: Alert SOC Manager
data.summary: Notify SOC manager of high-risk admin activity for review

config.message: High-risk admin activity detected for {{$.trigger.alert.admin_email}}. {{$.nodes.am-4.result.action_count}} actions performed. Off-hours: {{$.nodes.am-4.result.off_hours}}. Audit ticket created.

data.title: Log Normal Activity
data.summary: Log the admin activity as normal — within expected baseline

config.note: Admin activity for {{$.trigger.alert.admin_email}} reviewed. Activity within expected behavioral baseline. No action required.

config.summary: Admin privilege activity monitoring actions completed
